nasb.text: It shall be when you hear the sound of marching in the tops of the balsam trees, then you shall go out to battle, for God will have gone out before you to strike the army of the Philistines.”

esv.text: And when you hear the sound of marching in the tops of the balsam trees, then go out to battle, for God has gone out before you to strike down the army of the Philistines.”

cnv.text: 你一聽見桑林樹梢上有腳步的聲音，就要出戰，因為　神已經在你前面出去擊殺非利士人的軍隊了。”

ccb.text: 当你听见桑树梢上响起脚步声时，就要进攻，因为那表示耶和华已在你前头去攻击非利士的军队了。”
